description: Fix all remaining build, type-check, and test failures from the Bun-to-Node migration. After this PRD, npm run build, npm run type-check, npm run lint, npm run knip, npm run test, and npm run test:e2e must all pass with 0 errors.

userStories.title: Fix minimatch type declaration error and tsconfig.scripts.json reference error
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want the build and type-check to pass so the project compiles cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build passes with 0 errors
npm run type-check passes with 0 errors
The minimatch import in scripts/check-tsconfig-coverage.ts compiles without TS7016
tsconfig.scripts.json does not produce TS6310 (noEmit reference conflict)
userStories.notes: Two issues: (1) scripts/check-tsconfig-coverage.ts imports minimatch but the installed version (3.1.5) doesn't match the declared dependency (^10.0.1) and lacks type declarations. Fix by running npm install to get the correct version, or add @types/minimatch. (2) tsconfig.scripts.json references platform/shared which may have noEmit causing TS6310. Check if tsconfig.scripts.json needs its own composite config or if the reference should be removed.

userStories.title: Fix create-plugin CLI test failures — replace bun/bunx spawning with node/npx
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want the create-plugin tests to pass under vitest on Node.js.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run test -- platform/create-plugin passes with 0 failures
No references to 'bun' or 'bunx' in spawned commands within the test file or the source code it tests
userStories.notes: The create-plugin CLI test spawns the scaffolding tool via spawnSync. The source code (platform/create-plugin/src/index.ts) or test file may use 'bun' or 'bunx' as the command. Replace with 'npx tsx' or 'node'. Check both the test file AND the source code — the test calls the actual CLI which may internally reference bun. Also check the scaffolded template — the generated package.json for new plugins may reference bun in its scripts.

userStories.title: Fix plugin-tools build E2E test failures — replace bun spawning with node/npx
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want the plugin-tools build E2E tests to pass under vitest on Node.js.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run test -- platform/plugin-tools/src/commands/build-e2e.test.ts passes with 0 failures
All 9 tests pass (builds, auto-tsc, validation errors)
No references to 'bun' in spawned commands within the test file or build command source
userStories.notes: The build-e2e tests spawn 'opentabs-plugin build' as a child process. The build command source (platform/plugin-tools/src/commands/build.ts) may use 'bun' for tsc or other subprocesses. Replace with node-compatible alternatives. The test also builds the plugins/e2e-test plugin as a fixture — ensure the fixture plugin's build works with npm/node.

userStories.title: Fix lint errors and knip issues from the migration
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want lint and knip to pass cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run lint passes with 0 errors
npm run knip passes with 0 issues
No eslint-disable comments added — all issues fixed at the source
userStories.notes: Run npm run lint and npm run knip, fix whatever they report. Common issues after migration: unused imports of bun-types, stale references to Bun APIs in comments that lint rules flag, unused dependencies in package.json. Do not add eslint-disable comments — fix the actual code.

userStories.title: Verify full test suite and E2E tests pass — fix any remaining failures
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want all 2081 unit tests and 357 E2E tests to pass with 0 failures.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run test passes: 74 files, 2081 tests, 0 failures
npm run test:e2e passes: 357 tests, 0 failures
userStories.notes: This is the final verification story. Run the full quality suite: npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run test && npm run test:e2e. If anything fails, investigate and fix. Any remaining failures are likely edge cases from the migration — broken imports, stale mocks, or process spawning issues. The E2E tests are the most important — they exercise the full stack (MCP server + Chrome extension + proxy hot reload). All 357 must pass.
